title: Expected Value
description: Build intuition for weighted averages of outcomes: from simple coin bets to the St. Petersburg paradox. Learn why a small positive edge compounds into certainty over time, and when expected value misleads — variance, Kelly sizing, and risk of ruin.
persona: For anyone who bets, invests, or makes decisions under uncertainty. No prior probability assumed; pattern-hitting times helpful but not required.
tagline: What do you gain, on average, each play?
